problem id: 2817d770
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  10111000 -> 11101110
  01010000 -> 01010101
  10000000 -> 00100010
  11011000 -> 01110111
  00000010 -> 00001000
  00010001 -> 01000100
  11111011 -> 11111111
  00110110 -> 11011101
  11000011 -> 00111111
  00010110 -> 01011101

query: 00011000
predicted answer: 01100110
